name: music-vibe-test
description: Static music identity, moment-based recommendation, and friend matching service deployed at my-music-vibe.com

scripts.test: node tests/p0-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/p1-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/p2-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/v2-smoke.test.cjs && node tests/v2-domain.test.mjs
scripts.test:syntax: node --check p0-fixes.js && node --check p1-experience.js && node --check p2-analytics.js && node --check p2-operations.js && node --check p2-static.js && node --check src/v2/main.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/helpers.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/app.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/screens.mjs && node --check src/v2/ui/actions.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/axes.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/archetypes.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/questions.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/contexts.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/tracks.mjs && node --check src/v2/data/copy.mjs && node --check src/v2/domain/profile.mjs && node --check src/v2/domain/recommendation.mjs && node --check src/v2/domain/match.mjs && node --check src/v2/infrastructure/storage.mjs && node --check src/v2/infrastructure/share.mjs

author: betelgeuze-kang
